Subject: Apology for Delay in Payment  

Dear Ms. Yoyo,  

I hope this message finds you well. I would like to sincerely apologize for the delay in processing your payment.  

We have successfully transferred the amount of $6,480 USD to the ApoStar IBAN account. Please find the payment receipt attached in this email for your reference.  

If you have any questions or need further assistance, feel free to contact me.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
